summary: An animated 'First 100 Days' statistics card: a navy background with gold-and-white text that counts up ICE arrest figures (66,463 illegal aliens, 2,288 gang members, 498 murder charges, 1,329 sex offenses) before resolving to a '100 DAYS -- Protecting America from THE WORST FIRST' card built from a mosaic of mugshots. Despite a music bed and animated text reveals, it contains no footage, narrative, or cinematic genre framing -- it is a stats/text-card infographic, which is explicitly out of scope.
notable_text: 100 DAYS Protecting America from THE WORST FIRST
